nav.trialBadgeTitle: You are on a 7-day free trial with full access. Tap to see Pro.
nav.badgeOverLimitTitle: On the free plan you can edit your 6 oldest spiders; the rest are read-only. Upgrade to Pro or delete spiders to unlock editing.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to view your collection
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your account and start tracking
auth.name: Name
auth.resetSent: Done! If that email exists, you'll receive a link in your inbox.
auth.resetSuccess: Password updated. You can now sign in.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.trialRegisterPromo: New accounts get a 7-day free trial with full access (same limits as Pro). After that, you can keep browsing and exporting, or subscribe to keep editing.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.noResults: No results for the selected filters.

dashboard.title: My Tarantulas
dashboard.emptyDesc: Add your first tarantula to start their file.
dashboard.noResults: No results for the selected filters.
dashboard.limitReached: You've reached the free plan limit of 6 tarantulas. Upgrade to Pro to add more.
dashboard.readOnlyHint: Read-only for this spider on the free plan — upgrade to Pro or delete spiders to unlock editing.
dashboard.trialBanner: You're on a 7-day free trial with full access.

readOnly.banner: Your trial has ended. You can browse your collection, history, and export data. Subscribe to Pro to add or edit entries.
readOnly.overLimitBanner: On the free plan you can edit your 6 oldest spiders; any extra spiders are read-only. Delete spiders or subscribe to Pro to unlock them. You can still export your data.

tarantula.lockedEditHint: Read-only on the free plan — upgrade to Pro or delete spiders to unlock editing.
tarantula.historyEmpty: No events recorded yet. Start by logging a feeding or molt.
tarantula.deceasedDesc: This will stay in {{name}}'s file. You can still view their history.

species.estimatedNote: * Care parameters based on keeper literature and community guides.
species.estimatedNoteWsc: Taxonomy verified by World Spider Catalog.

terrarium.title: 🏠 Terrarium recommendation *
terrarium.estimatedNote: * Estimated based on the species' adult size and keeper guides.

form.name: Name *
form.photoCropHint: You can adjust the crop before saving.
form.limitReached: You've reached the free plan limit of 6 tarantulas.
form.limitTrialHint: Pro gives you an unlimited collection. New accounts get a 7-day trial; if you already used yours, subscribe to continue.
form.importError: Could not import species from GBIF.
form.importErrorWsc: Could not import species from WSC.
form.postCreateDesc: Do you want to log the last feeding or last molt now so tracking starts with better data?
form.postCreateSaveError: Could not save the initial record.
form.firstFeedingHint: If you don't remember the date, that's fine: the feeding schedule can start when you log the first real feeding.

reminders.panelProNotice: Includes manual reminders and Pro automatic suggestions.
reminders.freeNotice: Free plan: manual reminders only (ones you create yourself).
reminders.freeAutoUpsell: Pro adds automatic feeding reminders based on each spider’s history. Try Pro or upgrade to turn them on.
reminders.panelFreeUpsell: Want automatic feeding reminders? That’s included in Pro.
reminders.proNotice: Pro plan active: you see manual reminders and automatic feeding suggestions.

gallery.title: 📷 Gallery
gallery.empty: No photos in the gallery yet.

public.notFound: Profile not found or not public.
public.loginToAccess: Sign in to view your collection
public.quickActionsProCTA: To log feedings, molts and behaviors when someone scans your QR you need Pro. New accounts get a 7-day free trial with everything unlocked.

pro.title: TarantulApp Pro
pro.subtitle: Features designed for large collections and automatic tracking.
pro.trialThenPricing: Try free for 7 days when you sign up, then $2.99/month or $29.99/year.
pro.freeTrialLine: 7-day free trial on signup — full access, then Free limits or read-only if you do not subscribe.
pro.freeLimit: Up to 6 tarantulas in your collection.
pro.freeQr: QR with basic info, no actions.
pro.proAutoReminders: Automatic feeding reminders based on your history.
pro.proQrActions: Per-tarantula QR with quick actions (feeding, molt logs, etc.).
pro.statusFree: You are using the free plan. Great for trying TarantulApp or small collections.
pro.statusPro: You are using TarantulApp Pro. You'll get every new feature as soon as it lands.
pro.soonPayments: Soon you'll be able to upgrade to Pro directly from the app. Meanwhile, we're building the features.
pro.checkoutSuccessBody: Your plan has been upgraded. All Pro features are now active.
pro.checkoutSuccess: Payment completed. We are updating your Pro plan.
pro.checkoutCancel: Checkout cancelled. Your current plan did not change.
pro.checkoutError: Could not start checkout right now.
pro.checkoutNotConfigured: Stripe checkout is not configured in this environment yet.
pro.publicToggleProOnlyHint: Upgrade to Pro to make this card scannable by anyone.
pro.ctaRegisterTrialReminder: New accounts include a 7-day trial with full Pro features. If you already used yours, subscribe below to keep unlimited access.
